onboardingSteps.welcome: Welcome to the Seller Center tour. We start with your seller profile.

profile.overview: This is your seller profile. Here you can view and edit all your account information.
profile.tabs: Use these tabs to navigate between the different sections of your profile.
profile.tabProfile: In the Profile tab you'll find your personal information: name, email, phone and photo. Keep this data updated so your customers recognize you.
profile.tabConfiguration: In Configuration you customize your store data: business name, description, and general preferences for your business.
profile.tabSecurity: In Security you can change your password and manage access to your account to keep it protected.
profile.tabDocuments: In Documents you upload the legal files required by the platform: tax ID, business registration, contracts, among others.
profile.tabResponseTemplate: Response Templates let you save predefined messages to quickly answer frequent customer inquiries in the chat.

home.overview: Here you have a quick overview of your store's overall performance with the most important indicators of the day.
home.metrics: This panel shows key metrics: average order value, total sales and order evolution over time.
home.reputation: Here you can see your reputation as a seller, including cancellations, claims and customer response time.
home.lastOrders: A summary of your latest transactions so you always have the status of your recent sales up to date.
home.topProducts: Your star products: the items you sell the most and that drive the growth of your store.
home.topCustomers: Your most frequent and highest-value customers, so you can focus your loyalty efforts.

dashboard.overview: The Dashboard is your analytics center. Here you'll find interactive charts with sales, orders, best-selling products and top customers to make informed decisions.
dashboard.summary: This consolidated summary shows you the most relevant financial and performance indicators of your business in one place.

products.sidebar: In the Products section you manage your entire catalog. You can view, edit and control the inventory of the items you offer on the platform.
products.list: This is your complete product catalog. From here you can search, filter, edit prices, update stock and manage the status of each item.
products.load: Load Products lets you add new items to your catalog, either individually or through bulk upload with files.

returns.sidebar: In Returns you manage all refund or exchange requests sent by your customers. Respond on time to maintain a good reputation.
returns.list: Here you see the complete list of returns: their status, reason and the steps to follow to resolve them correctly.

orders.sidebar: In Orders you find all orders placed by your customers. Manage the status of each order, from confirmation to dispatch.
orders.list: This list shows all your orders with their current status. You can filter by date, status or customer to quickly find what you need.

clients.sidebar: In Clients you have access to the complete directory of buyers who have purchased your products, with their purchase history and contact data.
clients.list: Explore each customer's profile, review their purchase history and use this information to improve your sales strategy.

feedback.sidebar: In Feedback you find all the opinions and ratings that your customers have left about your products and service. Respond and manage your reputation.
feedback.list: Here you can read each comment, answer questions and manage reviews to build the trust of new buyers.

academy.sidebar: The Academy is your learning center: courses, tutorials and resources so you can get the most out of the platform and grow your business.
academy.list: Explore the available courses, follow the lessons at your own pace and apply what you've learned to improve your sales.

chat.sidebar: The Chat allows you to communicate in real time with your customers, answer questions and provide personalized service that increases conversion.
chat.view: From here you manage all your active conversations. Use response templates to attend faster and with greater consistency.

subaccounts.sidebar: In Sub Accounts you manage your team's access: create collaborators, assign them specific roles and control which sections each one can see.
subaccounts.list: Here you see all active collaborators in your account. Manage their permissions to maintain security and order in your operation.

onboardingSteps.signOut: When you finish your session, use this button to log out securely and protect your account.
